name: cwd-manager
description: Per-working-directory heartbeat supervisor. Watches each opted-in CWD's TODO list (via getModuleApi('todos')) and CWD context, runs cheap programmatic ticks on an adaptive cadence (0.5/1/2 min active, 5 min idle), broadcasts status over the existing triggers SSE bus, and can optionally run explicit opt-in LLM agent checkups and autonomous worker chats. Agent ticks create/reuse one manager session per CWD and enrich the prompt with same-CWD chat-history snippets plus context-RAG hits; worker chats create focused task sessions and are separately opt-in when context-generator/context-rag is enabled. State persists to ctx.dataDir/state.json keyed by normalized cwd. Disabled by default per CWD (always explicit opt-in). Owns /v1/cwd-manager/* via ctx.routes. Soft-deps on todos / workflows-and-triggers / context-generator — all degrade gracefully.
